damageDescription: Numerous thin cracks in the brick facade, including diagonal and spiderweb patterns around windows and horizontal crack lines above the foundation. Foundation layer shows uneven texture, crumbling and missing material; central ground-floor area has pronounced cracking and chipping. Two ground-floor windows are boarded up.
prediction: Cracks in the brick facade and around windows; foundation shows crumbling. Two ground-floor windows are boarded up.

damageDescription: Boarded-up windows on white-painted sections; elevated foundations with visible support columns (inspect for cracks/spalling). Cracked and uneven paved surface in foreground; fire escapes visible. Utility pole leaning; mixed maintained and unmaintained building sections.
prediction: Boarded-up windows and elevated foundations with support columns. Cracked paved surface; fire escapes and a leaning utility pole.

damageDescription: Extensive cracking in concrete/pavement in foreground with vegetation growing through cracks. Building elevated on concrete stilts with exposed support structures; external metal staircase. Uneven ground with tire tracks and debris.
prediction: Cracking in pavement with vegetation; building on concrete stilts and external metal staircase. Uneven ground with debris.
